issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: You can pause your subscription by going to Settings > Billing > Subscription, then clicking the "Cancel Plan" button. This will show you the Pause Subscription option where you can select a pause duration between 1 and 12 months. Note that this feature is only available for monthly subscriptions (Individual Monthly - Basic or Interview Monthly) that have been active for at least 30 days.

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response: Yes, you can update the name on your certificate. You're allowed to update it once per account, and the change will apply to all your certificates. To update it: 1) Open your certificate page, 2) Enter the correct name in the 'Full Name' field, 3) Click 'Regenerate Certificate', and 4) Confirm by clicking 'Update Name'. Please note that once you update your name, you cannot change it again.

issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response:
To dispute a charge, follow these steps:

1. Contact your card issuer to question the charge on your billing statement
2. Your card issuer will then contact the merchant's bank (acquirer) for an accurate copy of the transaction record
3. The merchant will be asked to provide documentation to support the charge

For lost or stolen credit cards or additional support, you can call Visa's consumer support line for your country. The dispute process is designed to efficiently settle transaction disagreements between cardholders and merchants.

issue: I have found a major security vulnerability in Claude, what are the next steps
subject: Bug bounty
response: Thank you for reporting this security vulnerability. For major security vulnerabilities in Claude, please review Anthropic's Responsible Disclosure Policy and submit your report through the proper channels. If you've found a universal jailbreak (a technique that bypasses safety measures across multiple harmful queries), you can submit it through Anthropic's Model Safety Bug Bounty Program on HackerOne, which offers rewards up to $35,000. For other technical vulnerabilities like system misconfigurations or code injection issues, please refer to the Responsible Disclosure Policy at anthropic.com.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response:
To stop Claude from crawling your website, you need to add specific directives to your robots.txt file in your top-level directory. Add these lines:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

You'll need to do this for every subdomain you want to opt out from. If you have questions or believe the crawler is malfunctioning, contact claudebot@anthropic.com from an email that includes your domain name.

issue: I am allowing Claude to use my data to improve the models, how long will the data be used for?
subject: Personal Data Use
response: When you allow Claude to use your data to improve the models, we automatically de-link your data from your user ID before any review. However, the documentation does not specify an exact retention period or duration for how long your data will be used for model improvement purposes. You maintain full control and can adjust your privacy settings at any time to stop sharing data for model improvement. For specific information about data retention timelines, you may need to contact Anthropic support directly.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response:
To set up Claude LTI for your students, you'll need to complete three main steps:

1. **In Canvas**: Create a Claude LTI Developer Key (Admin → Developer Keys → + LTI Key) using the specified redirect URIs and settings, then install it as an app using the generated Client ID.

2. **In Claude for Education**: Sign in as an administrator, navigate to Organization settings → Connectors, enable Canvas, and input your Canvas Domain, Client ID, and Deployment ID.

3. **Questions**: If you have questions about your Claude for Education account or the LTI setup, contact your university's administrator(s).

The complete step-by-step instructions are available in the documentation for setting up the Canvas integration.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: Visa does not set minimum purchase amounts for card transactions. Merchants are not allowed to require a minimum purchase amount when you use your Visa card. This applies whether you're in the US Virgin Islands or anywhere else. If a merchant is requiring a $10 minimum, they are violating Visa's merchant rules. You can report this issue to Visa using their online form for in-store purchase problems, or contact Visa support at 1 800 847 2911 (the number for US Virgin Islands is not specifically listed, but you can use the general US/Caribbean number).
